task: I need to answer a company’s follow-up about a billing issue, and I want the reply to be clear and easy to use. Can you help me draft something I can send without a lot of back-and-forth?

turns.agent_response:
Yes — here’s a short, clear reply you can send:

> I am disputing the balance you listed because it does not match the last bill I paid. Please send a full itemized breakdown of the charge, the basis for each amount, and any supporting records. Please also place any collection or late-action activity on hold until I have had a chance to review the documentation. Please reply in writing.

If you want, I can make it:
- firmer
- more neutral
- shorter
- tailored to a utility, contractor, or service account

user_simulator.text: Pretty good, but make it a little tighter and less chatty. I don’t want them invited to argue. Also add that they need to identify the account number and the date the charge was posted. A version I can actually send would be better.

turns.agent_response:
Absolutely — here’s a tighter version you can send:

> I dispute the balance shown on this account. Please provide a full itemized breakdown, including the account number, the date each charge was posted, the basis for each amount, and any supporting records. Please place any collection or late-action activity on hold pending review. Please respond in writing.

If you want, I can make it even firmer or shorter.

user_simulator.text: That’ll do. Clear enough, and it doesn’t give them much room to dance around it.
